jewelrystand: ^It's a display rack for jewelry. The edgy accessories give everyone nostalgic feelings.

b: ^NOUR: There's an empty spot on the rack. A black leather bracelet is missing... ^&PORTRAIT_mssuwan_mssuwanpondering ^MS. SUWAN: "..." ^&PORTRAIT_nour_nourpondering ^NOUR: "Hmm..."

jewelrystandconvo: ^The first bracelet has black beads and a silver pentagram charm.
^The second is black leather with silver studs.
^NOUR: "I would have loved to be able to wear this kind of thing in high school."
^NOUR: "You look like you would've liked this too, boss lady."
^MS. SUWAN: "That's a bold assumption to make."
^NOUR: "Doesn't everyone have some sort of phase like this?"
^MS. SUWAN: "Being young often entails exploring your identity in different ways."
^NICK: "Hah, I can't imagine what you were like that once!"
^NICK: "Or, did ya get all the crazy out of your system at parties?"
